purpose: Determine which depth, IMU, and DVL diagnoses may be displayed as confirmed and which must remain possible or log-only.

interpretation_rules.strong_direct: A diagnosis may be shown as confirmed only if its frozen per-scenario recall is at least 95 percent.
interpretation_rules.ambiguous: Bias, drift, weak spikes, partial-channel stuck, and intermittent loss remain possible or log-only unless a later independent frozen benchmark validates them.
interpretation_rules.brief_unavailability: The current sample may be certainly unavailable while persistent hardware failure remains an unconfirmed maintenance hypothesis.
interpretation_rules.ftc: Temporary safety fallback during a real brief outage is allowed; protective action persisting after recovery is not allowed.
interpretation_rules.thrusters: Sensor evidence must never select a thruster target.

execution_rules: Do not edit hashed files or the scenario matrix after this protocol is written.
Do not inspect outcomes before all 75 missions finish.
Do not overwrite or rerun the V1 output directory.
If V1 exposes a gap, preserve it and create a separately named V2 with new seeds.
